data.title: Lagardere Groupe GAAP EPS of €1.18, revenue of €8.94B
data.description:
• Lagardere Groupe press release (OTCPK:LGDDF): FY GAAP EPS of €1.18.
  • Revenue of €8.94B (+10.6% Y/Y).
  • Group recurring EBIT totalled €593 million in 2024 versus €520 million in 2023.
  • The Group reported profit before finance costs and tax of €578 million in 2024 (versus €434 million in 2023).
  • In 2024, the Group’s free cash flow2 amounted to €423 million, up €162 million from €261 million in 2023.
  • Net debt fell sharply to €1,855 million at 31 December 2024 from €2,043 million at 31 December 2023, a reduction of €188 million thanks to cash generation from operations.
  • The leverage ratio (net debt/recurring EBITDA) came out at 2.4x, markedly improved from 31 December 2023 (2.97x).

data.title: Tomra Systems ASA reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Tomra Systems ASA press release (OTCPK:TMRAY): Q4 GAAP EPS of €0.18.
  • Revenue of €398M (+12.4% Y/Y).

data.title: Japan Tobacco reports FY results
data.description:
• Japan Tobacco Inc. press release (OTCPK:JAPAY): FY Revenue of ¥3.15T
  • Core revenue at constant FX increased by 8.4% to JPY 2,958.4 billion
  • Adjusted operating profit at constant FX increased by 7.5% to JPY 782.7 billion
  • On a reported basis, adjusted operating profit increased by 3.3% to JPY 751.9 billion
  • Operating profit increased by 3.7% to JPY 697.2 billion
  • Profit decreased by 3.9% to JPY 463.4 billion
  • Free cash flow decreased by JPY 273.2 billion to JPY 170.5 billion
  • The Company plans to pay an annual dividend per share of JPY 194 (a dividend payout ratio of 74.3%)
  • FY2025 Forecasts (vs. FY2024): Revenue is forecast to increase by 3.9% to JPY 3,273.0 billion; Core revenue at constant FX is forecast to increase by 6.6% to JPY 3,232.0 billion; Adjusted operating profit at constant FX is forecast to increase by 8.4% to JPY 815.0 billion; On a reported basis, adjusted operating profit is forecast to decrease by 2.2% to JPY 735.0 billion; Operating profit is forecast to decrease by 3.8% to JPY 671.0 billion; Profit is forecast to decrease by 2.9% to JPY 450.0 billion; Free cash flow is forecast to increase by JPY 177.5 billion to JPY 348.0 billion;The Company plans to offer an annual dividend per share of JPY 194 (a dividend payout ratio of 76.5%).

data.title: BASE reports FY results
data.description:
• BASE press release (OTCPK:BAINF): FY GAAP EPS of ¥0.55.

data.title: Billionaire Airbnb co-founder Joe Gebbia to join Musk’s DOGE - report
Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Non-GAAP EPS of €3.95, revenue of €20.44B
data.description:
• Coca-Cola Europacific Partners press release (NASDAQ:CCEP): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of €3.95.
  • Revenue of €20.44B (-1.3% Y/Y).
  • The company said that it is well-placed for FY25 and beyond; announcing €1B share buyback over next 12 months.

data.title: InflaRx dips 16%, prices $30M stock offering
data.description:
InflaRx N.V. (NASDAQ:IFRX) priced its underwritten public offering of 8.25M shares at an offering price of $2.00 per ordinary share, and pre-funded warrants to purchase up to 6.75M shares.

All ordinary shares and pre-funded warrants in the offering are being sold by the company.

The offering is expected to close on February 18, 2025.

Underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase up to 2.25M additional ordinary shares.

The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering primarily to fund clinical development of its pipeline candidates, including vilobelimab and INF904, and for general corporate purposes.

The stock price dropped ~16% on Friday during pre-market hours of trading.

data.title: Dentsu Non-GAAP EPS of ¥162.81; initiates mid-term management plan from FY2025 to FY2027
data.description:
• Dentsu press release (OTCPK:DNTUF): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of ¥162.81.
  • Revenue of ¥335.8B (+4.2% Y/Y).
  • FY2025 guidance; the Group organic growth is expected to be 1%. We target operating margins at 12%, a decline compared to FY2024, mainly due to upfront internal investments to restore competitiveness.
  • Key financial targets to be achieved by FY2027: 1. Organic growth: 4.0% 2. Operating margin: 16-17% 3. Operating cash flow for the year: 140 billion yen 4. ROE: mid-teens range.

data.title: Norsk Hydro to propose cash dividend of NOK 2.25 a share
data.description:
• Norsk Hydro (OTCQX:NHYDY) has decided to propose to the general meeting a dividend of NOK 2.25/share dividend.
  • Payable May 20; for shareholders of record May 13; ex-div May 13.
  • See NHYDY Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Eutelsat Communications reports 1H results; reaffirms FY 2024–25 objectives
data.description:
• Eutelsat Communications press release (OTCPK:EUTLF): 1H Revenue of €606.2M (+5.9% Y/Y).
  • Operating verticals revenues of €600m up 3.9% like-for-like.
  • Adjusted EBITDA margin of 55.2%.
  • First Half Video revenues were down by 6.4% to €309.2 million, in line with the broader secular market decline.
  • Total Connectivity revenues for the First Half of FY 2024-25 stood at €290.7 million, up by 21.1% on a reported basis and up by 17.8% like-for-like.
  • First Half Fixed Connectivity revenues stood at €118.9 million, up 22.2% year-on-year.
  • First Half Government Services revenues stood at €96.4 million, up by 21.9% year-on-year.
  • First Half Mobile Connectivity revenues stood at €75.3 million, up 7.1% year-on-year.
  • The backlog stood at €3.7 billion on 31 December 2024 versus €3.9 billion a year earlier.
  • FY 2024–25 objectives confirmed; Gross capital expenditure in FY 2024-25 initially expected in a range of €700-800 million euros is now expected c.€200 lower, in a range of €500-600 million euros.
  • Eutelsat also continues to target leverage of c.3x in the medium term.
